hero.description: A comprehensive platform that enables shipping companies to track shipments, manage clients, and streamline delivery operations from a single dashboard.

items.description: Maintain full control over all shipping operations from creation to delivery with complete oversight.

items.title: Client Management

whyChooseUs.title: An Integrated Cloud Platform for Shipping and Logistics Companies
whyChooseUs.description: Our system is designed to help shipping companies manage their daily operations with efficiency, from shipments, clients, and drivers to reporting and accounting, all through a single, secure, and user-friendly platform.

features.title: Real-Time Shipment Tracking
features.description: Track every shipment's journey in real-time and monitor its current status from creation through to final delivery.

features.title: Branch and Warehouse Management
features.description: Oversee operations across all branches and warehouses from one dashboard, with full visibility of shipment movement between them.

features.title: Driver and Fleet Management
features.description: Assign shipments to drivers, track trips, and manage your entire fleet efficiently and effortlessly.

features.title: Route and Delivery Point Management
features.description: Define trip routes, delivery and pickup points to ensure shipments follow the most optimal path.

features.title: Instant Notifications and Updates
features.description: Automatically notify clients and staff when shipment status changes, trips begin, or deliveries are completed.

features.title: Operational Reports and Analytics
features.description: Review company performance, shipment volumes, revenue, trips, and completion rates through detailed reports and charts.

driverApp.description: Provide your drivers with a professional experience through a dedicated app for managing trips, tracking shipments, and communicating directly with the system.
features: View all shipments and trips assigned to the driver
Update shipment status with a single tap during delivery
Track trip details, waypoints, and current shipment status
Supports over 10 languages with an intuitive driver interface

items.title: Smart Shipment Management
items.description: Create shipments effortlessly, monitor transport stages, and manage all delivery operations from a single dashboard that helps you improve speed and efficiency.

items.title: Real-Time Shipment Tracking
items.description: Track each shipment's status in real-time and know its current location and route until it reaches the client, with continuous updates.

items.title: Driver and Trip Management
items.description: Distribute shipments among drivers, monitor trips, and coordinate transport operations to ensure optimal performance.

items.title: Client and Account Management
items.description: Organize client data, orders, payments, and account balances with a complete history of all operations.

items.title: Multi-Company SaaS Platform
items.description: Support multiple companies within the platform with complete data isolation, user management, and role-based permissions in a secure environment.

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know About the Smart Shipment Management System
faq.description: Get familiar with the platform's functionality, shipment management, subscriptions, and permissions before getting started.

items.question: What is the Shipment Management System?
items.answer: A SaaS platform that helps shipping and logistics companies manage shipments, clients, drivers, trips, and reports through an intuitive, all-in-one dashboard.

items.question: Can the system support multiple companies?
items.answer: Yes, the platform is built on a multi-tenant architecture where each company has its own independent account with complete data isolation and permission controls.

items.question: Can I manage users and permissions?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can create multiple users and assign different permission levels based on each user's role within the company.

items.question: How do I create and track shipments?
items.answer: You can create a new shipment by adding client details, specifying pickup and delivery points, assigning a driver, and tracking its status throughout the delivery process.

items.question: Does the system offer real-time shipment tracking?
items.answer: Yes, the platform provides real-time tracking that allows you to monitor shipment status, trip progress, and receive the latest updates at a glance.

items.question: Can I manage drivers and trips?
items.answer: Yes, you can manage drivers, assign trips, and monitor transport operations performance directly from the dashboard.

items.question: Does the system operate on a subscription model?
items.answer: Yes, the platform follows a SaaS subscription model, allowing companies to choose the plan that best fits their operational needs.

items.question: Can I change my subscription plan later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or change your plan at any time as your company grows and your requirements evolve.

timeline.upcomingDescription: The shipment has not yet reached this stop.

items: Dashboard for user and shipment management

items.q: Can I change my subscription plan at any time?
items.a: Yes, you can switch between monthly and annual plans in accordance with the system's policies.

items.q: What information is displayed in the plan details?
items.a: The page displays the subscription type, price, and duration based on the available plan data.

items.q: Are there any hidden fees or long-term commitments?
items.a: All displayed prices are transparent; any additional payment details are based on the system's configuration.
